cabinet.title: The Firm
cabinet.description: Pacific Blue Consulting, an independent consulting firm founded in 2017 by Pascal Bazer-Bachi, former Director of Civil Aviation for French Polynesia.

hero.label: The Firm
hero.title: A firm built on field experience

manifeste.p1: In a territory where every island is a world of its own, where European regulation meets Pacific realities, where an aerodrome handling 200 passengers a week must meet the same requirements as an international hub - you need people who know how to build.
manifeste.p2: Pacific Blue Consulting was born of this conviction: island territories deserve the same rigour, the same ambition and the same quality of consulting as major metropolises, but with an intimate understanding of what makes them unique.
manifeste.p3: Since 2017, we have created airlines, certified airports, secured construction works on operating platforms, supported the ecological transition, trained managers, and structured food and craft supply chains. Because the sovereignty of a territory is built on all of these fronts at once.
manifeste.p4: Our method is nothing mysterious: understand before recommending, listen before structuring, and never deliver a document without making sure it can actually be implemented by those who will own it.
manifeste.p5: None of our projects ever starts from scratch. Like the spiral of the shell we use as our emblem, every mission builds on the ones before it - and with each turn, the perspective is wider, the experience richer, and the ability to make structural choices more assured.

portrait.name: Pascal Bazer-Bachi
portrait.imageAlt: Pascal Bazer-Bachi — Founder of Pacific Blue Consulting
portrait.bioP1: I work for island territories. Over the years, that has become my centre of gravity.
portrait.bioP2: I started in civil aviation on the ground in 1993. From there, I worked my way up every rung — operations, engineering, European satellite operations as Director of EGNOS Operations, territorial regulation in Picardy, safety and security oversight in French Polynesia, then heading the Civil Aviation Authority of French Polynesia and its network of forty-three airports spread across five archipelagos. And finally running a Polynesian airline, this time as an operator. Thirty years seeing the profession from every angle, which changes the way you then support the organisations that practise it.
portrait.bioP3: I founded Pacific Blue Consulting in 2019 to turn that experience into a useful instrument for the public and private actors of the Pacific. When we are entrusted with a project, we do not stop at recommendations: we commit, we own the trade-offs, we stay through to the end. The firm works on structural transformations — aviation, environment, infrastructure, territorial supply chains — as a multidisciplinary team, with partners chosen for their expertise and their standards.
portrait.bioP4Strong: My job is to leave organisations stronger after my work than before.
portrait.quote: "I see consulting as a lever for building capability. My goal is not for my clients to need me indefinitely - it is for them to be better equipped after my work than before. Curiously, that is often what brings them back."

ecosysteme.intro: Pacific Blue Consulting is your single point of contact and the guarantor of quality on every engagement. But some projects call for complementary skills: that is why we rely on a trusted ecosystem, built up over more than 60 missions.

2017.title: Founding of Pacific Blue Consulting

2017-2020.title: First structural missions
2017-2020.description: Support to Tahiti Nui Helicopters (2017-2018). Certification of Islands Airline and start of the modernisation of Air Loyauté (2019). Support for the Vinci Airports bid and contribution to the creation of Air Bora Bora (2020).

2021-2023.title: Multi-territory deployment
2021-2023.description: Compliance and certification for Air Loyauté (Air Operator Certificate, Part-145, Part-CAMO). Inter-island Marquesas route with Tahiti Air Charter. CNAM training programmes and creation of a Part-147 centre with Air Formation. DIREN biodiversity certification.

2024-2025.title: Ecological transition and innovation
2024-2025.description: Master plans for Moorea and Huahine airports. Carbon footprint of the DAC-PF and decarbonisation roadmap. 10 Aerodrome Safety Impact Studies delivered. Innovative marine airports with Terciel. TAVIVAT project (food sovereignty).

2025.title: South Pacific reach
2025.description: Feasibility study for a regional air route Tahiti - Cook Islands - Tonga - Samoa - Fiji. More than 60 missions delivered since the firm's creation.

coquillage.label: Our identity
coquillage.title: The shell, emblem of Pacific Blue
coquillage.p1: The visual identity of Pacific Blue Consulting is born from a stylised shell whose spiral opens and grows as it unfolds. This spiral suggests that no project ever starts from scratch: we revisit familiar themes — safety, service continuity, business models, governance — but with each turn, the perspective is wider, the experience richer, and the ability to make structural choices more assured.
coquillage.p2Before: The shell is also a tribute to Polynesia and the great Pacific Ocean, where it is at once a daily object, a symbol of the lagoons, and a tangible trace of the bond between land and sea. It echoes the
coquillage.p2After: , the conch you blow to signal your presence, announce an event or welcome navigators on their approach — like a clear and benevolent call across the vastness.
coquillage.p3: This image expresses the vocation of PBC: welcoming, guiding and securing our clients' trajectories in a complex environment, with deep respect for the territories and the people we serve.

mobilites.title: Mobility & Air transport
mobilites.subtitle: Building, structuring and securing aviation operations
mobilites.approach:
Air transport in an island setting is not just another service - it is the vital link between communities separated by the ocean. Every airline, every route, every aerodrome is a link in a chain of territorial continuity on which the health, economy and social cohesion of entire communities depend.

Pacific Blue Consulting works across the full lifecycle of an air operator: from the initial idea to daily operations, from the first page of the business plan to maintaining certifications year after year. Our strength is to speak the language of regulators (DGAC, EASA), of investors and of flight crews all at once.

We have built airlines where none existed, brought struggling operators back into compliance, designed routes through mountainous terrain, and supported concession bids against the world's largest groups.
coverage: Airline creation and structuring (from legal status to Air Operator Certificate)
Business plans, economic models and commercial strategy
Operating certification and operational documentation (MANEX, safety and security management manuals)
EASA compliance: Part-145, Part-M, Part-CAMO, Part-OPS
Regulatory audits and compliance action plans
Aerodrome Safety Impact Studies (EISA) - 10 delivered since 2024
Airport security expertise (audits, governance, TSA interface)
Inter-island route strategy and territorial continuity
Drones and UAVs: strategy, operations manuals, aerial imagery
Aerodrome rescue and fire-fighting (SSLIA), AFIS and maintenance documentation
mobilites.focusText:
Pascal Bazer-Bachi is one of the few experts in the Pacific to combine senior leadership within the regulatory authority and hands-on consulting practice in airport safety and security.

Since 2024, 10 Aerodrome Safety Impact Studies delivered on platforms ranging from the Tuamotu atolls to Tahiti-Faa'a international airport (wide-body B777/A350, work on operating sites, multi-stakeholder coordination). Methodology aligned with national and European requirements; residual risks placed within the ALARP zone.

On security: experience chairing Airport Security Operational Committees (COS) and Airport Security Commissions, and as the interface with the US TSA on the Tahiti-Faa'a platform.
missions: Creation of Tahiti Nui Helicopters (2017-2018)
Certification of Islands Airline - 47 documents (2019)
Creation of Air Bora Bora (2020-2023)
Modernisation of Air Loyauté (2019-2023)
Support to Vinci Airports - Faa'a concession bid (2020)
10 Aerodrome Safety Impact Studies for DAC-Pf and Etik Pf/AdT (2024-2025)
Marquesas safety study - 75 events, 4 mountainous fields (2021-2022)
Wallis-Futuna Public Service safety study - 100+ events (2023-2024)
South Pacific regional air route (2025)
SSLIA regulations and AFIS manuals for the DAC-Pf (2024-2025)
mobilites.result: Aviation operations launched on solid foundations, certifications obtained and maintained, risks under control - because territorial continuity is not a concept, it is the daily reality of island life.

infrastructures.title: Infrastructure & Territories
infrastructures.subtitle: Designing the platforms that connect island communities
infrastructures.approach:
A coral aerodrome with an 800-metre runway in the Tuamotu. A port in the Loyalty Islands that must absorb vital freight traffic. A private runway on a protected atoll. Every island infrastructure is a special case - and yet each must comply with international standards designed for very different contexts.

Pacific Blue Consulting knows how to navigate this equation. We design master plans that account at once for regulatory constraints, land realities, the financial capacity of local authorities and the expectations of the communities they serve.
missions: Province of the Loyalty Islands (DPA) - ports and airports (2024-2029)
Master plan for Moorea and Huahine airports (2024-2025)
Closure of non-conformities on the Tetiaroa runway (2024-2025)
Polynesian aerodrome network - MLA (2021)
Feasibility studies in Lifou (Wanaham and Hmeleck - 2022)
Terciel - floating marine airports (2022-2030)
Temae airport road study - Municipality of Moorea

environnement.title: Environment & Sovereignty
environnement.subtitle: Supporting the ecological transition and resilience of territories
environnement.approach:
The sovereignty of an island territory plays out on several fronts at once: reducing its dependence on fossil fuels, protecting biodiversity that is unique in the world, feeding its population with its own resources, and showcasing the know-how that shapes its identity.

Pacific Blue Consulting supports this transition with the same rigour we bring to civil aviation: fact-based diagnostic, quantified targets, realistic roadmap, and long-term support. We do not sell environmental rhetoric - we build mechanisms that work.
missions: Carbon footprint of the DAC-Pf and decarbonisation roadmap (2025)
DIREN biodiversity certification (2021-2023)
Update of the environmental impact assessment framework (2025-2026)
Market study of local staple foods - TAVIVAT project (2025-2026)
Steering of the TAVIVAT project - DAG (2026-2027)
Pandanus drying facility - Traditional Crafts Service (2025-2026)

transformation.title: Transformation, Skills & Business creation
transformation.subtitle: Supporting those who transform, those who learn, and those who start a business
transformation.approach:
The most ambitious projects fail when the organisations that must deliver them are not ready — and the most dynamic territories stall when the talent that could transform them does not dare to take the leap into entrepreneurship. That is why a core part of our work is to strengthen teams, clarify responsibilities, equip managers, train those who will make tomorrow's decisions, and support entrepreneurs through the creation of their business.

Whether we are supporting an operator in the middle of a transformation, a team that needs training, or an entrepreneur creating their first business, our conviction is the same: it is the women and the men who bring organisations to life. And it is by equipping them, clarifying what is expected of them and securing their choices that we build sustainable trajectories.
coverage: Training and change management (project management, leadership, compliance)
Professional and executive coaching for leaders and managers
Design and facilitation of training programmes
Creation and structuring of accredited training centres (Part-147, etc.)
HR structuring, organisation and clarification of responsibilities
Support for new business creation: situation analysis, choice of legal status, registration paperwork
Business plan development and preparation of funding applications (banks, SOFIDEP, ADIE, public schemes)
Follow-up of initial tax and social obligations for newly created businesses
transformation.focusText:
Starting a business in French Polynesia means crossing an administrative threshold that often feels insurmountable: CDFE, RCS, DICP, CPS, CAPL, banking, insurance. Pacific Blue Consulting supports future Polynesian entrepreneurs along the entire journey, from choosing the right legal status to effective registration, from business plan to securing funding.

Our service does not replace public schemes — CCISM, ADIE, SOFIDEP, DGAE — it helps you make full use of them. We take on the heaviest part of the formalities: situation analysis, choice of path (sole trader licence, company, agricultural or otherwise), preparation and submission of applications, and follow-up through to obtaining the necessary registration numbers.

Our offering:

• Sole-trader licence (patente) — to operate as an individual.

• Company creation — limited liability or simplified joint-stock companies (SARL, EURL, SAS) for projects requiring a corporate structure.

• Agricultural project creation — farming, livestock, lagoon fisheries, pearl farming.

• Business plan and funding support — bank applications, SOFIDEP, ADIE and public schemes.

• End-to-end creation with funding — integrated project combining the creation of the structure and the mobilisation of financing.

• Start-up follow-up — securing the first months of activity and the initial tax and social deadlines.
missions: CNAM Managers' Club (2021-2022)
Air Formation Part-147 centre - turnkey creation (2022)
Organisation & HR for Air Loyauté (2020-2023)
Project management training - HSF (2024-2025)
Support for the creation of sole-trader and corporate businesses
Preparation of funding applications with banks, SOFIDEP and ADIE
Start-up support for new Polynesian businesses
transformation.result: More capable teams, clearer organisations, better-equipped managers, project owners who move from idea to a registered business, and professional or entrepreneurial trajectories made secure. Because a territory's best investment is its talent and those who dare to build.

cta.title: Your project could be next.
cta.subtitle: Let's talk through your challenges and build together.

tavivat-dag-pilotage.title: Project Management Support for the TAVIVAT Project — Implementation Phase
tavivat-dag-pilotage.description: Operational and strategic support for managing the implementation phase of the TAVIVAT project, a territorial demonstrator for agro-ecological food crop transition and agro-processing, including planning tools, coordination facilitation, and progress reporting.
tavivat-dag-pilotage.benefit: More reliable management of a large-scale multi-stakeholder program, securing of technical and financial milestones, improved coherence between partners and activities, and enhanced capacity to achieve food sovereignty objectives and the development of local food crops across the 10 pilot municipalities.

etude-marche-vivriers-dag.title: Market Study for New Food Products Based on Local Food Crops
etude-marche-vivriers-dag.description: Comprehensive market study for new food products made from local food crops (taro, cassava, breadfruit, sweet potato, banana) as part of the TAVIVAT project, targeting school catering, the hospitality and restaurant sector, and large-scale retail.
etude-marche-vivriers-dag.benefit: Access to reliable demand sizing to secure agro-processing investments, guide production and packaging capacity, and support the scaling up of local food-crop products in school catering and other markets.

ligne-pacifique-sud-seac.title: Air Route Study: Tahiti — Cook Islands — Tonga — Samoa — Fiji
ligne-pacifique-sud-seac.description: Feasibility study for launching and operating a regional air route linking Tahiti to the Cook Islands, Tonga, Samoa, and Fiji, aimed at improving connectivity and economic integration among Pacific island states.
ligne-pacifique-sud-seac.benefit: Strengthened strategic positioning for French Polynesia, a roadmap for regional connectivity, and demonstrated economic viability.
ligne-pacifique-sud-seac.client: State Civil Aviation Authority in French Polynesia (SEAC-Pf)

rco-sslia-dac-pf.title: Development of a New Generation of SSLIA Operational Procedure Manuals (RCO)
rco-sslia-dac-pf.description: Development of a new generation of Operational Procedure Manuals (RCO) for aerodrome firefighting services (SSLIA), featuring an innovative Master document concept and a centralized procedures database.
rco-sslia-dac-pf.benefit: Modern, modular manuals, simplified documentation maintenance, sustained operational compliance, and continuously updated procedures.

manuels-afis-dac-pf.title: Development of AFIS Operations Manuals
manuels-afis-dac-pf.description: Development of Operations Manuals for AFIS (Aerodrome Flight Information Service) services, featuring a Master concept and a database of aeronautical information procedures, usable across all French Polynesian aerodromes.
manuels-afis-dac-pf.benefit: Standardized AFIS manuals, improved consistency of airport information, simplified maintenance, and sustained operational compliance.

manuels-maintenance-electrotechniques-da.title: Development of Maintenance Manuals for Electrotechnical Assets
manuels-maintenance-electrotechniques-da.description: Development of technical and maintenance manuals for all electrotechnical assets managed by the DAC-Pf (information systems, airport equipment, transmissions), featuring a Master concept enabling predictive maintenance.
manuels-maintenance-electrotechniques-da.benefit: Standardized technical maintenance manuals, predictive maintenance capability, reduced downtime, improved system availability, and lower operating costs.

manuels-exploitation-uav.title: Development of UAV Operations Manuals
manuels-exploitation-uav.description: Comprehensive drafting of operations manuals for drones/UAVs, including flight procedures, maintenance, safety instructions, emergency procedures, and French/European regulatory compliance.
manuels-exploitation-uav.benefit: Complete and compliant UAV documentation, qualified and certified operators, safe drone operations, and professional, regulation-compliant aerial imaging missions.

eisa-dac-pf.title: Airport Safety Impact Studies (EISA)
eisa-dac-pf.description: Conduct of airport safety impact studies for various operational or infrastructural modifications across French Polynesian airport facilities, including risk mapping and mitigation recommendations.
eisa-dac-pf.benefit: Airport safety impacts identified upfront, reduced risks, modifications validated from a safety standpoint, and sustained regulatory compliance.

etude-drones-polynesie.title: Exploratory Study of Drone Deployment Opportunities in French Polynesia
etude-drones-polynesie.description: Exploratory strategic study on opportunities for deploying drones/UAVs in French Polynesia: civil applications, applicable European regulatory framework, air safety considerations, operating business models, and public-policy recommendations.
etude-drones-polynesie.benefit: Clarified drone strategy, defined regulatory framework, identified commercial opportunities, and a governmental roadmap for the UAV sector.

outil-modelisation-desserte.title: Air Service Modeling Tool for French Polynesia
outil-modelisation-desserte.description: Development of a simulation tool to model inter-island air service based on variable parameters (fleets, capacities, frequencies, costs, connectivity). Strategic decision-support tool for optimizing territorial continuity.
outil-modelisation-desserte.benefit: A strategic planning tool made available, air-service scenarios that can be visualized, better-informed public aviation decisions, and improved connectivity resilience.

imagerie-aerienne-telepilote.title: Aerial Imaging Missions by Remote Pilot
imagerie-aerienne-telepilote.description: Professional aerial imaging missions using DJI equipment for institutional and private clients: airport infrastructure monitoring, mapping, inspection, and visual documentation, carried out by PBC's president, a qualified remote pilot.
imagerie-aerienne-telepilote.benefit: Professional and compliant aerial imaging, high-resolution visual data, expertise in aerial data acquisition, and comprehensive inspection reports.

schema-amenagement-moorea-huahine.title: Development Master Plan for the Moorea and Huahine Airports
schema-amenagement-moorea-huahine.description: Development of an airport master plan for the island facilities of Moorea and Huahine: needs analysis, development scenarios, infrastructure priorities, and operating models.
schema-amenagement-moorea-huahine.benefit: A defined airport master plan, prioritized future investments, coherent tourism development, and planned regional connectivity.

air-tetiaroa-conformite-piste.title: Support for Resolving Non-Conformities on the Tetiaroa Runway
air-tetiaroa-conformite-piste.description: Strategic support for resolving compliance gaps on the Tetiaroa landing runway, including a regulatory adaptation strategy, demonstrative safety studies, and optimization of airport investments.
air-tetiaroa-conformite-piste.benefit: Compliance gaps resolved in an economically viable manner, sustainable operating authorizations, certification of the Tetiaroa runway, and long-term continuity of aerial tourism activities.

actualisation-eie-nie.title: Updating of the Environmental Assessment Framework (EIE – NIE)
actualisation-eie-nie.description: Comprehensive update of the Environmental Impact Studies (EIE) and Environmental Impact Notices (NIE) framework in French Polynesia: revision of criteria and processes, alignment with international standards, and training of assessors.
actualisation-eie-nie.benefit: A modernized and harmonized EIE/NIE framework, higher-quality environmental assessments, better-informed infrastructure projects, and streamlined environmental compliance.

bilan-carbone-dac-pf.title: DAC-Pf Carbon Footprint Assessment and Decarbonization Roadmap
bilan-carbone-dac-pf.description: Comprehensive assessment of the DAC-Pf's institutional carbon footprint and development of an ambitious decarbonization roadmap with quantified targets, priority actions, and tracking metrics.
bilan-carbone-dac-pf.benefit: DAC-Pf carbon footprint established, institutional climate commitment affirmed, decarbonization roadmap adopted, and the institution's CSR credibility strengthened.

accompagnement-creation-entreprises.title: Support for the Creation of Sole Proprietorships and Companies
accompagnement-creation-entreprises.description: End-to-end support for entrepreneurs starting a business: economic feasibility, legal and tax structuring, business plan, financing, registration, and intensive entrepreneurial coaching.
accompagnement-creation-entreprises.benefit: Entrepreneurs equipped and confident, businesses built on solid foundations, improved 3-year survival rate, optimized legal structures, and easier access to financing.

province-iles-loyaute-ports-aeroports.title: Integrated Strategic Support for Ports and Airports — Loyalty Islands (DPA)
province-iles-loyaute-ports-aeroports.description: Multi-year support for the DPA across the full port and airport spectrum of the Loyalty Islands Province: ongoing technical assistance, strategic analyses, capacity building, an island-wide infrastructure master plan, and shared governance.
province-iles-loyaute-ports-aeroports.benefit: An integrated vision of maritime and air mobility, better-informed investment decisions, and strengthened resilience of island connectivity for the benefit of local communities.
province-iles-loyaute-ports-aeroports.client: Loyalty Islands Province — Ports and Airports Department (DPA)

sechoir-pandanus-artisanat.title: Feasibility Study for a Pandanus Drying Facility
sechoir-pandanus-artisanat.description: Technical, economic, and organizational feasibility study for the creation of a shared pandanus drying facility intended for traditional Polynesian craftspeople: equipment sizing, business model, and impact on craft employment.
sechoir-pandanus-artisanat.benefit: Structured pandanus craft sector, public investment effectively targeted, local craft jobs made sustainable, greater value placed on traditional products, and continuity of indigenous know-how.

air-bora-bora-structuration.title: Startup Airline Structuring — Creation of Air Bora Bora
air-bora-bora-structuration.description: Complete creation of a startup airline: legal structuring (SAS), registration, business plan, commercial strategy, and flight program (Moorea/atoll routes), project management, and launch schedule coordination.
air-bora-bora-structuration.benefit: Validated legal and financial structure, credible commercial strategy, projects brought to completion, and a successful launch with established partnerships.

amo-air-bora-bora.title: End-to-End Project Management Assistance (AMO) for the Air Bora Bora Project
amo-air-bora-bora.description: Full project management assistance: overall steering of the airline creation project, coordination among founders, investors, and service providers, risk management, and adherence to schedules and budgets.
amo-air-bora-bora.benefit: Project completed despite its complexity, schedule and budgets respected, risks anticipated and managed, airline launch successful, and operations started in line with the plan.

air-loyaute-modernisation.title: Structuring and Modernization of Air Loyauté
air-loyaute-modernisation.description: Multi-year support for Air Loyauté in evolving its organization and its technical and operational frameworks: updating compliance files (CTA, Part-145, Part-M, Part-CAMO), strengthening the SGS, structuring HR, and updating procedures.
air-loyaute-modernisation.benefit: An airline aligned with current regulatory requirements, consolidated internal processes, harmonized documentation and operational practices, and a strengthened safety culture across teams.

conformite-certification-air-loyaute.title: Compliance and Certification Files — Internal and External Audits — Air Loyauté
conformite-certification-air-loyaute.description: Full management of compliance and certification files: CTA, Part-145, Part-M, Part-CAMO, Part-OPS. Preparation for and support during internal and external audits (authorities and third-party auditors).
conformite-certification-air-loyaute.benefit: Air transport certifications maintained, audits passed, EASA compliance continuously demonstrated, and certified operations.

sgs-air-loyaute.title: Safety Management System (SGS) — Strengthening — Air Loyauté
sgs-air-loyaute.description: Support in strengthening the SGS: consolidating feedback and lessons-learned processes, facilitating SGS bodies (SAG, SRB), defining and monitoring operational safety indicators, and supporting internal audits.
sgs-air-loyaute.benefit: A consolidated SGS, a more widely shared safety culture across teams, and finer-grained management of operational safety issues.

procedures-operationnelles-air-loyaute.title: Operational Procedures and Flight Operations Management — Air Loyauté
procedures-operationnelles-air-loyaute.description: Drafting and ongoing updating of comprehensive operational procedures: normal and abnormal flight procedures, approaches, emergency procedures, crew flight manual, line maintenance procedures, and diversion management.
procedures-operationnelles-air-loyaute.benefit: Crews trained and calibrated, standardized operations, optimized flight safety, and structured incident management processes.

organisation-rh-air-loyaute.title: Organization & HR Function — Structuring and Managerial Support — Air Loyauté
organisation-rh-air-loyaute.description: Support in evolving the internal organization and the HR function: clarifying responsibilities, analyzing decision-making processes, structuring HR processes, and supporting the implementation of workforce management tools.
organisation-rh-air-loyaute.benefit: A clearer organization, better-equipped HR functions, more clearly identified responsibilities, and a strengthened contribution of the managerial and HR dimension to the airline's overall governance.

dsp-wallis-futuna-air-loyaute.title: Implementation of the Wallis & Futuna DSP — Air Loyauté
dsp-wallis-futuna-air-loyaute.description: Strategic and operational assistance for the implementation of a Public Service Scheme (DSP) for Wallis & Futuna: operational strategy, fleet configuration, procedure definition, contracts, and support for the first flights.
dsp-wallis-futuna-air-loyaute.benefit: The Wallis & Futuna DSP successfully implemented, robust and secure operations, territorial continuity for Wallis & Futuna ensured, and communities served on a regular basis.

aeroports-marins-terciel.title: Business Model for an Innovative Marine Airports Company — Terciel SAS
aeroports-marins-terciel.description: Development of a detailed business model for Terciel SAS: service description, customer segment identification, revenue models (landing fees, aircraft services, fuel), pricing, and financial scenarios.
aeroports-marins-terciel.benefit: Business model validated with investors, the company's financial structure clarified, economic viability demonstrated, and commercial rollout guided.

brochure-terciel.title: Commercial Brochure and Airport Product Presentation — Terciel
brochure-terciel.description: Drafting of a professional commercial brochure presenting Terciel's value proposition: innovative marine/floating airport services, competitive advantages, standard offering, and strategic vision.
brochure-terciel.benefit: Commercial tools available for prospecting, potential clients informed about a differentiated offering, market positioning clarified, and the sales approach launched.

cahier-charges-terciel.title: Specifications — Marine and Floating Airports — Terciel
cahier-charges-terciel.description: Drafting functional and technical specifications for the design and construction of innovative marine and floating airport platforms: marine technical specifications, safety standards, and capacity requirements.
cahier-charges-terciel.benefit: Precise specifications ready for implementation, validated technical requirements, streamlined contracting with builders, and assured quality of deliverables.

aeroport-lifou-wanaham.title: Feasibility Study — International Airport Classification for Lifou (Wanaham)
aeroport-lifou-wanaham.description: In-depth feasibility study for classifying the Lifou (Wanaham) platform as an international airport: analysis of technical, regulatory, and commercial constraints, investment scenarios, and business model.
aeroport-lifou-wanaham.benefit: Decision-makers equipped with a robust feasibility analysis, guidance for subsequent studies, a validated airport investment strategy, and clear prospects for regional development.

aeroport-hmelek-lifou.title: Study for the Creation of an Airport Open to Public Air Traffic (CAP) — Hmelek, Lifou
aeroport-hmelek-lifou.description: Technical, regulatory, and socio-economic feasibility study for the creation of an airport platform open to public air traffic (CAP) on the lands of the Hmelek tribe, including local consultation and land-tenure compliance.
aeroport-hmelek-lifou.benefit: A regional infrastructure project studied in full, confirmed local acceptance, administrative files ready for submission, and a structured strategic development vision.

centre-part147-air-formation.title: Turnkey Setup of a Part-147 Training Center — Air Formation
centre-part147-air-formation.description: End-to-end creation of an EASA-approved Part-147 training center for aircraft maintenance training: infrastructure design, approval acquisition, curriculum organization, team recruitment, and program launch.
centre-part147-air-formation.benefit: An operational, EASA-approved Part-147 center, an established local aviation training pathway, cohorts of certified students, and strengthened regional maintenance capability.

instructeurs-part147-air-formation.title: Recruitment and Qualification of Part-147 Instructors — Air Formation
instructeurs-part147-air-formation.description: Complete process for recruiting and qualifying Part-147 instructors: candidate selection, online (e-learning) training, qualification examinations, and EASA approval as certified instructors.
instructeurs-part147-air-formation.benefit: A pool of qualified, EASA-approved Part-147 instructors, guaranteed training quality, a stable and professional teaching team, and confirmed EASA recognition of the center.

livrets-mtoe-air-formation.title: Aviation Training Manuals and Materials (MTOE) — Air Formation
livrets-mtoe-air-formation.description: Full drafting of training manuals and teaching materials for MTOE aviation training: theoretical content, case studies, practical exercises, and documentation compliant with EASA standards.
livrets-mtoe-air-formation.benefit: Students equipped with comprehensive teaching materials, recognized training, structured maintenance skills, and EASA certifications earned upon completion.

certification-biodiversite-deploiement.title: Biodiversity Certification — Development, Rollout, and Promotion
certification-biodiversite-deploiement.description: Design, implementation, and promotion of the 'Biodiversity-Protecting Company' certification scheme in French Polynesia: defining the criteria, building the certification process, and running workshops with airlines.
certification-biodiversite-deploiement.benefit: A credible and operational certification scheme, better-informed and more engaged airlines, and the promotion of environmental initiatives to clients and institutional partners.

certification-biodiversite-analyse.title: Biodiversity Certification — Process Analysis and Improvement
certification-biodiversite-analyse.description: Phase 3 of the project: critical analysis of the biodiversity certification process, mapping of the program's safety and viability risks, and improvement recommendations for robustness, airline acceptance, and financial viability.
certification-biodiversite-analyse.benefit: A robust and sustainable biodiversity certification process, improved acceptance among airline clients, a long-term viable DIREN program, and demonstrable real-world environmental impact.

formations-cnam-club-managers.title: CNAM Training Engagements — Managers' Club
formations-cnam-club-managers.description: Facilitation of the CNAM French Polynesia Managers' Club: collaborative working sessions bringing together public- and private-sector executives around project management, change management, strategic management, and networking.
formations-cnam-club-managers.benefit: A strengthened executive network, developed managerial skills, improved success rates in entrance examinations (senior grades, public management qualifications), and stronger professional-network cohesion.
formations-cnam-club-managers.client: CNAM (Conservatoire National des Arts et Métiers)

ateliers-codeveloppement-cnam.title: Co-Development Workshops — Managers' Club
ateliers-codeveloppement-cnam.description: Facilitation of professional co-development sessions bringing executives together around real-life management situations, following a structured collective-intelligence method with rotating client/consultant roles.
ateliers-codeveloppement-cnam.benefit: Greater perspective on managerial practices, co-created and immediately actionable solutions, stronger peer support, and sustainable development of the manager-coach mindset.
ateliers-codeveloppement-cnam.client: CNAM (Conservatoire National des Arts et Métiers)

formation-gestion-projet-cnam.title: Project Management Training — CNAM
formation-gestion-projet-cnam.description: Training public- and private-sector executives in project management: fundamentals (scope, timelines, resources, budget), methods (Gantt, workload, risks), digital tools, and preparation for the CNAM Project Management Degree.
formation-gestion-projet-cnam.benefit: Executives trained and certified in project management, better-structured and well-delivered institutional and private projects, increased managerial effectiveness, and enhanced participant employability.

formation-conduite-changement-cnam.title: Change Management Training — CNAM
formation-conduite-changement-cnam.description: Training in organizational change management: diagnosis, transformation models (Kotter, Lewin), change communication, resistance management, and collective buy-in.
formation-conduite-changement-cnam.benefit: Managers equipped to lead organizational transformations, better-accepted and well-integrated changes, reduced risk of deadlock, and successful transitions within organizations.

formation-culture-generale-cnam.title: General, Economic, and Managerial Knowledge Training — CNAM
formation-culture-generale-cnam.description: Training in general economic, managerial, and institutional knowledge: the Polynesian economic context, public management principles, corporate strategy, sector trends, and governance challenges.
formation-culture-generale-cnam.benefit: A stronger grasp of the economic, political, and managerial context, a more solid general knowledge base, a broadened strategic vision, and smoother preparation for positions of responsibility.

tutoring-licence-management-cnam.title: Tutoring — Management Degree Preparation — CNAM
tutoring-licence-management-cnam.description: Personalized tutoring for CNAM students preparing for the Management Degree: one-on-one coaching, dissertation support, exam preparation, and career-placement follow-up.
tutoring-licence-management-cnam.benefit: Tailored support for learners, improved degree pass rates, smoother career placement, and accelerated career trajectories.

concours-dgrh.title: DGRH Competitive Examinations — Exam Design and Marking
concours-dgrh.description: Design of qualifying examination papers and marking of scripts for the professional examination for promotion to the grade of Chief Engineer (Lot 4 of the DGRH competitive examinations), including production of primary and backup papers.
concours-dgrh.benefit: Secure conduct of the competitive examinations, papers aligned with the expected level, consistent and traceable marking, and smooth running of the DGRH professional examinations.

diagnostic-aerodromes-polynesiens.title: Compliance Assessment of the French Polynesian Aerodrome Network
diagnostic-aerodromes-polynesiens.description: Comprehensive regulatory compliance audit of the entire French Polynesian aerodrome network managed by MLA: analysis of authority findings, identification of gaps, and a prioritised action plan.
diagnostic-aerodromes-polynesiens.benefit: An overall view of network compliance, clarified improvement priorities, a defined compliance strategy, and well-structured authority submissions.

certification-aeroports-aerodrome.title: Airport Certification — Per-Aerodrome Submissions
certification-aeroports-aerodrome.description: Preparation and drafting of certification submissions for each aerodrome in the network: technical documentation, declaration of compliance, and submission to the DGAC to obtain and maintain operating certifications.
certification-aeroports-aerodrome.benefit: Up-to-date airport certifications for every platform, authorisation for regular operations, continued regulatory compliance, and reduced risk of suspension.

pieces-detachees-twin-otter.title: Management of Repatriated Twin-Otter Spare Parts
pieces-detachees-twin-otter.description: Detailed inventory and administrative management of spare parts for the Twin-Otter F-OIQF aircraft returned to French Polynesia following a repatriation, with an inventory report and full traceability.
pieces-detachees-twin-otter.benefit: A secure and transparent inventory, parts returned in good order, and clarified financial responsibility.

tac-desserte-inter-iles.title: Inter-Island Service Setup — Documentation and Compliance — Tahiti Air Charter
tac-desserte-inter-iles.description: Complete operational setup of a new inter-island service (Marquises): drafting of the Operations Manual, MANEX, site-specific operational procedures, DAC-Pf compliance documentation, and approval letters.
tac-desserte-inter-iles.benefit: A new service launched in compliance with regulations, secure inter-island connections, DAC-Pf acceptance obtained, and island communities served.

etude-securite-marquises-tac.title: Safety Study — Inter-Island Operations in Mountainous Archipelago — Marquises
etude-securite-marquises-tac.description: Specific safety study for aerial operations in the mountainous terrain of the Marquises: terrain risk mapping, meteorological factors, critical flight paths, safety acceptability assessment, and recommendations.
etude-securite-marquises-tac.benefit: Operational safety demonstrated despite demanding terrain, DAC-Pf acceptance for operations obtained, and Marquises operations approved and safe.

continuite-territoriale-aerienne.title: Inter-Island Air Territorial Continuity — Framework and Proposals
continuite-territoriale-aerienne.description: Presentation of the regulatory and strategic framework for air territorial continuity on inter-island routes, with proposals to strengthen the public subsidy scheme and optimised business models.
continuite-territoriale-aerienne.benefit: A clarified policy framework, validated territorial continuity proposals, optimised allocation of subsidies, and strengthened inter-island connectivity.

moz-ulm-moorea.title: Setting Up a Microlight Operation — Presentation File and Compliance — MOZ ULM Moorea
moz-ulm-moorea.description: End-to-end support for setting up a microlight base in Moorea: drafting of the presentation file, application letter to DAC-Pf, safety justification, infrastructure compliance, and environmental authorisations.
moz-ulm-moorea.benefit: A microlight base officially established, operations launched in compliance with regulations, certifications obtained, and microlight tourism activities made sustainable.

diagnostic-aratika.title: Assessment and Improvement Plans — Island Airport Runway Operations (Aratika)
diagnostic-aratika.description: In-depth operational audit of the Aratika airport platform (south): analysis of infrastructure, ground-side aspects, operational capacity, identification of vulnerabilities, and recommendations.
diagnostic-aratika.benefit: An operating decision grounded in a solid assessment, identified operational risks, prioritised improvement solutions, and well-directed future investments.

vinci-airports-candidature.title: Strategic Support for Vinci Airports' Bid — Faa'a Concession
vinci-airports-candidature.description: Full support for Vinci Airports' bid for the operating concession of Tahiti-Faa'a: production of 5 technical papers (traffic, OSP, certification, security, and international benchmarking).
vinci-airports-candidature.benefit: A complete and highly credible bid, demonstrated competitive differentiation, and a well-structured submission for government selection.

vinci-airports-etudes-thematiques.title: Complementary Thematic Studies — Airport Development — Vinci Airports
vinci-airports-etudes-thematiques.description: Technical and commercial support studies for the Tahiti-Faa'a bid: airport maintenance work, airport taxation regimes, and technical input for the tender.
vinci-airports-etudes-thematiques.benefit: A strengthened tender response, validated technical inputs, and a competitive final submission.

islands-airline-structuration.title: Full Structuring of a Regional Airline — Islands Airline
islands-airline-structuration.description: End-to-end support for Islands Airline's operating certification: drafting of 47 operational documents (MANEX A/B/C/D, MGN, MGS) and compliance matrices to obtain the CTA.
islands-airline-structuration.benefit: CTA obtained, operations launched on solid foundations, and regulatory compliance demonstrated to the DAC-Pf.

islands-airline-documentation.title: Certification and Operational Documentation — Islands Airline
islands-airline-documentation.description: Full drafting of 47 operational documents for operating certification: MANEX A (General Policy), MANEX B (Procedures), MANEX C (Safety), MANEX D (Technical), MGN, MGS, and regulatory compliance matrices.
islands-airline-documentation.benefit: Complete and compliant operational documentation, certification obtained from the DAC-Pf, and operations governed and secured from day one.

islands-airline-business-plan.title: Business Plan and Economic Model — Islands Airline
islands-airline-business-plan.description: Complete strategic and financial preparation for Islands Airline: detailed business model, flight schedules, financial structure, and partnerships (notably with TASC for maintenance).
islands-airline-business-plan.benefit: A commercial strategy validated by investors, secured financing, and a credible commercial launch on a realistic timeline.

optimisation-helicopteres-tnh.title: Optimisation and securing of helicopter operations in French Polynesia
optimisation-helicopteres-tnh.description: Analysis of TNH helicopter operations across two bases (Pago/Bora Bora, Taravao): comprehensive identification of regulatory and operational gaps, with proposed solutions to achieve EASA compliance.
optimisation-helicopteres-tnh.benefit: A clarified operating framework, improved compliance, preserved continuity of air service, and minimised operational risks.

audit-organisationnel-dac-pf.title: Organisational audit — Civil Aviation Authority of French Polynesia (DAC-Pf)
audit-organisationnel-dac-pf.description: Regulatory audit and organisational assessment of the DAC-Pf: analysis of processes and structure, identification of areas for improvement, and a proposed action plan to support the evolution of the organisation.
audit-organisationnel-dac-pf.benefit: A consolidated view of the DAC-Pf's situation, a shared roadmap for organisational adjustments, and strengthened internal governance.

audit-part145-partm-tasc.title: Part-145 and Part-M compliance audit — TASC
audit-part145-partm-tasc.description: Comprehensive compliance audit against Part-145 (aircraft maintenance) and Part-M (owner-operator) regulations, in accordance with EASA Regulation 1321/2014.
audit-part145-partm-tasc.benefit: Demonstrated regulatory compliance, secured maintenance operations, controlled non-compliance risks, and up-to-date certifications.

plan-actions-conformite-tasc.title: Compliance action plan — TASC
plan-actions-conformite-tasc.description: Development and implementation of a comprehensive action plan to resolve the compliance gaps identified during the audits conducted by the civil aviation authorities (2019-2021): improvement timeline, assignment of responsibilities, and execution tracking.
plan-actions-conformite-tasc.benefit: Compliance gaps resolved, certifications maintained, improved relationship with the authorities, and guaranteed operational continuity.

tahiti-nui-helicopters.title: Creation and structuring of Tahiti Nui Helicopters
tahiti-nui-helicopters.description: End-to-end design and structuring of the new helicopter company Tahiti Nui Helicopters: assessment of mission profiles (passenger transport, medical evacuations, aerial work), aircraft selection, maintenance organisation, business model, and start-up plan.
tahiti-nui-helicopters.benefit: Establishment of a structured and viable helicopter operator, capable of meeting transport, tourism, and medical evacuation needs across a highly dispersed territory, while optimising investments, pooling resources, and ensuring complementarity with other aviation stakeholders.

commune-moorea-route-aeroport.title: Temae airport access road study
commune-moorea-route-aeroport.description: Study of the access road to Temae airport on Moorea, including traffic flow analysis, road safety, and integration with the airport development plan.
commune-moorea-route-aeroport.benefit: Improved accessibility and safety of Moorea airport, with smoother passenger and cargo flows.

eisa-etik-adt.title: EISA for Etik Pf / Air Tahiti
eisa-etik-adt.description: Preparation of airport safety impact studies (EISA) for the works carried out by Etik Pf and Air Tahiti on Polynesian platforms.
eisa-etik-adt.benefit: Secured airport works, compliance with national and European requirements, and controlled residual risks.

formation-hsf.title: Project management training
formation-hsf.description: Project management training for HSF teams, covering methodology, planning and tracking tools, and change management.
formation-hsf.benefit: Teams trained and self-sufficient in project management, with improved execution of internal projects.

ias-accompagnement.title: Operational support for IAS
ias-accompagnement.description: Operational support for the airline IAS, including regulatory compliance and operational assistance.
ias-accompagnement.benefit: Compliant and secure operations, with assured operational continuity.

kroma-prod-imagerie.title: Professional aerial imagery
kroma-prod-imagerie.description: Professional aerial drone imagery assignments for Kroma Prod, including high-resolution aerial video and photo capture.
kroma-prod-imagerie.benefit: Professional-quality aerial visual content for audiovisual productions.

commune-hiva-oa.title: Infrastructure project support
commune-hiva-oa.description: Support to the Municipality of Hiva Oa on its airport infrastructure projects in the Marquises.
commune-hiva-oa.benefit: Infrastructure adapted to the constraints of the Marquesas, with improved service to the island.

perspectives.title: Insights
perspectives.description: Analyses, position papers and reflections on the topics we know - to inform debate and support better decisions.

hero.headline: Insights
hero.intro: Analyses, position papers and reflections on the topics we know - to inform debate and support better decisions.

perspectives.outro: These articles will be published gradually. Stay informed by following us on

desserte.title: The future of inter-island connectivity: 2030 scenarios
desserte.description: Which economic and regulatory models can sustainably connect the Polynesian archipelagos? A forward-looking analysis of the available scenarios.

drones.title: Civilian drones in the Pacific
drones.description: Opportunities, regulatory framework and concrete use cases for integrating drones into island operations.

eisa.title: Aerodrome Safety Impact Studies: lessons learned from securing airport works
eisa.description: After 10 impact studies delivered, what lessons can we draw to improve methodology and strengthen the safety culture?

securite.title: Safety and security: towards an integrated approach to risk
securite.description: How to break down the silos between safety and security for more effective risk management on airport platforms.

vivriers.title: Local staple foods and food sovereignty
vivriers.description: Structuring local supply chains to feed island territories: reflections on the TAVIVAT project and development perspectives.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: A question, a request for proposal, an idea to explore - we are listening. First conversation with no commitment.

hero.label: Contact
hero.title: Let's talk about your project
hero.intro: A question, a request for proposal, an idea to explore - we are listening. First conversation with no commitment.
